build.name: Whisper Beast 2026
build.description: Whisper-quiet 1440p gaming, same-box Twitch streaming via RTX 5080 NVENC, and Portal SDK dev build. Target <26 dBA under load. AM5 platform for 5+ year upgrade path. Wired 2.5GbE for low-latency gaming.

parts.name: AMD Ryzen 7 9850X3D
parts.description: New gaming king on AM5 (launched Jan 2026). +400MHz boost over 9800X3D. 96MB L3 cache excels in extraction-shooter and CPU-bound workloads. 2-5% faster than 9800X3D in Arc Raiders scenarios.

parts.name: MSI RTX 5080 Ventus 3X OC 16GB
parts.description: Primary gaming GPU and same-box stream encoder. 170-220+ FPS at 1440p Ultra with DLSS4/MFG. 9th-gen NVENC handles 1080p60/1440p60 OBS encode with negligible gaming impact. ~24 dBA load with custom fan curve. Street price stabilized ~$1,249 vs $999 MSRP.

parts.name: Corsair Vengeance 64GB DDR5-6000 CL40
parts.description: 64GB for simultaneous Arc Raiders, OBS, SDK dev, browser, and Discord with no constraint. DDR5-6000 is the Zen5 sweet spot — speed above this gives <1% gain.

extras.name: Arctic Liquid Freezer III 360
extras.description: Quietest 360mm AIO available. <22 dBA idle, ~25 dBA load. Keeps 9850X3D under 65C.

extras.name: ASRock X870 LiveMixer WiFi
extras.description: X870 chipset, PCIe 5.0. 25 USB ports (14 rear including USB4). Onboard 2.5GbE wired Ethernet — mandatory for low-latency Arc Raiders. WiFi as fallback only.

extras.name: WD Black SN850X 4TB NVMe Gen4
extras.description: 7,000/6,600 MB/s. Fast game loads and Portal SDK map compiles. Old SSDs reused for 12TB+ total.

extras.name: Fractal Design Define 7 Compact
extras.description: Sound-dampened bitumen/wool panels. Best-in-class silence with 2x Dynamic fans included.

extras.name: Corsair RM1000e 1000W 80+ Gold
extras.description: Zero-RPM fan mode below 40% load — completely silent at idle/light gaming. Headroom for future GPU upgrades.

extras.name: Noctua NF-A12x25 PWM 3-Pack
extras.description: Sub-20 dBA case airflow. Replaces stock fans for ultimate quiet operation.

extras.name: Windows 11 Pro
extras.description: Required for DX12 Ultimate and Arc Raiders optimization.
